question: How to calculate EMI?
answer: EMI formula: EMI = P × R × (1+R)^N / ((1+R)^N - 1), where P = Principal, R = Monthly interest rate (annual rate / 12 / 100), N = Tenure in months. Example 1: ₹10 lakh at 8.5% for 10 years → EMI ≈ ₹12,399/month. Example 2: ₹5 lakh at 9% for 5 years → EMI ≈ ₹10,379/month. Use our EMI Calculator on the right panel for instant calculation!

question: EMI कैसे निकालें?
answer: EMI फार्मूला: EMI = P × R × (1+R)^N / ((1+R)^N - 1)। जहाँ P = मूलधन, R = मासिक ब्याज दर, N = महीनों में अवधि। उदाहरण: ₹10 लाख पर 8.5% पर 10 साल = EMI ₹12,399/माह। हमारे EMI कैलकुलेटर का उपयोग करें!

question: EMI कसे काढायचे?
